ratings.note: First-time rating assigned. LT bank facilities INR145cr (CARE A-/Stable); LT/ST bank facilities INR35cr (CARE A-/Stable / CARE A2+).
Upgraded from CARE A-/Stable. LT bank facilities INR145cr (CARE A/Stable); LT/ST bank facilities INR35cr (CARE A/Stable / CARE A2+, ST reaffirmed).

ratings.instrument: long-term bank facilities (enhanced to INR208.32cr from INR145cr)
ratings.note: Reaffirmed CARE A/Stable on enhanced facilities: LT bank facilities INR208.32cr (up from INR145cr); LT/ST bank facilities INR40cr (up from INR35cr, CARE A/Stable / CARE A2+). Cites experienced promoters, established OEM relationships, 1,700+ qualified products, consistent revenue growth, PBILDT margins consistently above 25%. Constrained by elongated working capital cycle and project risk from large debt-funded capex.
